finding_results.notes: Compressed the closing so it performs only the required turn: Nate tests the easy delay fantasy, recognizes the project's distributed momentum, and exits on the active December 28 deadline.
finding_results.summary: The chapter now pivots from signature horror into a cleaner operational conclusion and stops once Nate understands he needs real leverage before December 28.

summary: Revised the back third of Chapter 7 to remove repeated thematic restatement and end on Nate's changed objective and the live demolition deadline.
